/usr/bin/cc -DJIT_HELPER_HISTO=1 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mac_gui.dir/mac_gui.c.o -o ../mac_gui   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_ttf/2.24.0/lib -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf
